title: Polymorphic card function component with typed slots and :global
prompt: Write a Phoenix 1.7+ function component module at lib/my_app_web/components/card.ex (module MyAppWeb.Components.Card). Export a single function card/1 that takes: attr :variant, :string, values: ["info", "warning", "danger"], default: "info"; attr :class, :string, default: nil; attr :rest, :global; slot :header; slot :body, required: true; slot :footer. The rendered markup must include a class attribute that combines "card", "card-#{@variant}", and @class. Pass @rest onto the outer <div>. Render header/footer conditionally via :if={Enum.any?(@header)} and :if={Enum.any?(@footer)} — the slot may be empty. Do NOT use phx-value-. NOT a LiveComponent.
tier_rationale: Requires full function-component surface: attr with value constraints + :rest :global + named slots with required/optional + slot emptiness check. Sonnet usually forgets the :global pass-through or the Enum.any? slot check.
